habitat: Meadows and mountain pastures of Europe.
habitatDe: Wiesen und Berg Weiden von Europa.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional astringent women's herb; mild diarrhea teas.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditionell astringent women's Kraut; mild diarrhea Tees.
cautions: Generally mild; seek care for heavy menstrual issues.
cautionsDe: Im Allgemeinen mild; seek Pflege für heavy menstrual issues.
historicalNotes: Alchemists' dew-catching leaf; Alpine meadow classic.
historicalNotesDe: Alchemists' dew-catching Blatt; alpin Wiese classic.
